meaning: n.[数]交集,十字路口,交叉点
examples: We crossed at a busy intersection.
The motorway ended at an intersection.
Du Du was in his usual spot: the middle of Borgela and Sans-Fil Streets, a hilly hairpin intersection between downtown and the airport.
The incident happened at about 14:00 local time at the intersection of Frenchmen and Villere streets.
